dict.string: InkSlate needs access to your calendar to display and manage your events.
InkSlate needs full access to your calendar to read and manage your events, create new events, and sync changes.
InkSlate can create and modify events in your calendar with write-only access.
InkSlate accesses your photo library to let you attach photos to your notes, places, recipes, and profile for a richer experience.
InkSlate needs permission to save photos to your photo library.
